data.cr0da_bio: Dr. Arun Sharma is a highly experienced General Physician with 15 years of practice. He specializes in preventive care, chronic disease management, and acute illness treatment. Known for his compassionate approach and thorough diagnostic skills.
data.cr0da_servicesoffered: General Consultations, Preventive Health, Chronic Disease Management, Fever and Infections, Health Checkups

data.cr0da_bio: Dr. Priya Reddy is a skilled dentist with a decade of experience in comprehensive dental care. She excels in cosmetic dentistry, root canal treatments, and pediatric dentistry. Her gentle approach makes dental visits comfortable for patients of all ages.
data.cr0da_servicesoffered: Dental Checkups, Teeth Cleaning, Root Canal, Cosmetic Dentistry, Pediatric Dentistry, Tooth Extraction

data.cr0da_bio: Dr. Vikram Singh specializes in musculoskeletal rehabilitation and sports injuries. With 8 years of experience, he employs evidence-based techniques and personalized treatment plans to help patients recover mobility and strength.
data.cr0da_servicesoffered: Sports Injury Rehabilitation, Back Pain Treatment, Post-Surgery Rehabilitation, Arthritis Management, Pain Management

data.cr0da_bio: Dr. Meera Patel is a dedicated pediatrician with 12 years of experience caring for children from newborns to adolescents. She focuses on growth monitoring, immunizations, and childhood illness management with a warm and reassuring manner.
data.cr0da_servicesoffered: Child Health Checkups, Vaccinations, Growth Monitoring, Childhood Illness Treatment, Developmental Assessment

data.cr0da_bio: Dr. Rajesh Kumar is a renowned cardiologist with 20 years of expertise in diagnosing and treating cardiovascular conditions. He specializes in preventive cardiology, heart failure management, and interventional procedures with a patient-centered approach.
data.cr0da_servicesoffered: Cardiac Evaluation, ECG and Echo, Heart Disease Management, Preventive Cardiology, Hypertension Treatment

data.cr0da_bio: Dr. Ananya Desai is a board-certified dermatologist with 7 years of experience treating various skin, hair, and nail conditions. She combines medical dermatology with aesthetic procedures to help patients achieve healthy, radiant skin.
data.cr0da_servicesoffered: Acne Treatment, Skin Allergy Management, Hair Loss Treatment, Cosmetic Dermatology, Laser Treatments

LocalizedLabels.Label: Medical professionals providing services at Docty Clinics
